ReadHumidity.ino.functionality: reads humidity data and prints the value to the serial port

ReadPlot.ino.functionality: reads temperature and humidity data from the DHT11 sensor and prints the values to the Arduino IDE serial plotter

ReadTempAndHumidity.ino.functionality: reads temperature and humidity data from the DHT11 sensor and prints the values to the serial port

ReadTemperature.ino.functionality: reads temperature data and prints the value to the serial port, handling potential error states
